name: Estimation VS Actual Summary Report_-NEW
query:
Select 
   `tabOperations`.name as "Operations:Data:250",
    `tabOperations`.date as "Date:Date:200",
    `tabOperations`.customer as "Customer:Data:200",
    `tabOperations`.branch as "Branch:Data:150",
    `tabOperations`.operation_status as "Status:Data:200",
    SUM( `tabGL Entry`.credit )as "Actual Income:Float:120",
    SUM( `tabGL Entry`.debit )as "ActualExpense:Float:120",
    ( SUM(`tabGL Entry`.credit) -   SUM(`tabGL Entry`.debit) ) as "Actual Profit or Loss:Float:180", 
    `tabOperations`.total_rate as "Estimated Income:Float:120",
    `tabOperations`.total_cost as "Estimated Expense:Float:120",
    (`tabOperations`.total_rate - `tabOperations`.total_cost) as "Estimated Profit or Loss:Float:180"
From
    `tabOperations` 
     LEFT JOIN `tabGL Entry` ON (`tabGL Entry`.project = `tabOperations`.name AND `tabGL Entry`.account in (select name from `tabAccount` where account_type in ('Income Account','Cost of Goods Sold') AND `tabGL Entry`.is_cancelled=0))

    GROUP BY
    `tabOperations`.name
